\section*{Book VI Continuum Bridge --- L4 Generated Shell}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Book VI L4 Shell}

\noindent\textit{Book~VI is the tool-licensing book. It establishes \emph{when} continuum language is lawful. The Effective Continuum Legitimacy Theorem (Thm.~VI.9.1 = \texttt{thm:VI.governing} [C]) is cited by GR, NS, and YM branch books. The Bridge Schema Theorem (\texttt{thm:VI.continuum-bridge-schema} [U]) is unconditional: both scoped certificate and separately proved bridge are always required.}
